data.title: Reliability Restructures Capital After Major Settlement Agreement
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Reliability ( (RLBY) ) is now available.

On February 16, 2026, Reliability Incorporated and its subsidiary Maslow Media Group entered into a settlement agreement with Vivos-related entities and individuals, resolving all remaining disputes stemming from prior arbitration and related litigation in Maryland. Under the deal, respondents agreed to transfer 253,292,210 shares of Reliability’s common stock back to the company, not challenge a key arbitral award, and grant mutual releases, with all money judgments to be marked satisfied and the arbitration and court case to be dismissed with prejudice once the transfer is confirmed.

The share transfer, characterized as a surrender in settlement of previously adjudicated claims, is expected to cut Reliability’s outstanding shares by about 84% to roughly 46,707,790, significantly reshaping its capital structure once completed. As of the latest report the company had not yet received transfer agent confirmation, but upon completion and filing of satisfactions and dismissals, management expects all pending disputes among the parties to be fully concluded, reducing litigation overhang for shareholders and potentially clarifying future corporate governance.

More about Reliability

Reliability Incorporated, a Texas-based corporation, is the parent of Maslow Media Group, Inc., a Virginia corporation. Through these entities, the company has been involved in staffing, media, and related business services, and has recently been engaged in extensive arbitration and litigation with various counterparties over ownership and control matters involving its common stock.

Average Trading Volume: 39,881

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $9M

data.title: Bluerock Homes Trust Issues Incentive Units to Executives
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A ( (BHM) ).

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. reported that its board, including independent directors, approved paying a portion of the base management fee for the quarter ended December 31, 2025 in long-term incentive plan units of its operating partnership rather than entirely in cash. The shift reflects the company’s ongoing use of equity-linked compensation to pay its external manager for advisory and general management services, partially replacing cash outflows.

On December 31, 2024, executives R. Ramin Kamfar and Jordan Ruddy elected to receive part of their 2025 base salaries in these C-LTIP Units to better align their interests with shareholders and reduce the manager’s cash expenditures. Pursuant to this election and a subsequent directive, on February 18, 2026 the operating partnership issued 22,252 fully vested C-LTIP Units, valued at $210,000, directly to the two executives in lieu of cash reimbursement, with the units eligible to convert into OP Units and ultimately into Class A common stock, reinforcing long-term incentive alignment for key management stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHM) stock is a Buy with a $11.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A stock, see the BHM Stock Forecast page.

More about Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. is a Maryland-based real estate investment company that operates through an external management structure. Its operating partnership, Bluerock Residential Holdings, L.P., and external manager, Bluerock Homes Manager, LLC, administer the company’s business activities and day-to-day operations under a long-term management agreement.

Average Trading Volume: 7,800

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $134.1M

An update from Otello Corporation ASA ( (GB:0FI5) ) is now available.

Otello Corporation ASA is continuing its current share buyback strategy to manage its capital structure and increase its treasury share holdings, building on previous repurchase programs authorized by shareholders. The company operates in the technology and internet services space and uses such programs as part of its broader approach to shareholder returns.

The company disclosed that Pareto Securities has repurchased 128,441 shares between 16 and 20 February 2026 at an average price of NOK 18.08, bringing total buybacks under the ongoing program to 273,954 shares. Otello has set a maximum price of NOK 20 per share and can acquire up to 3,689,541 shares under this mandate, and it now holds 3,963,495 treasury shares, underscoring a significant commitment to buybacks that may support the share price and signal management confidence.

data.title: Hi-View Resources Upsizes Private Placement to Raise Up to $2.0 Million
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Hi-View Resources Inc ( (TSE:GXLD) ).

Hi-View Resources Inc. has increased the size of its recently announced non-brokered private placement to up to 6,750,000 units at $0.30 per unit, for potential gross proceeds of $2,025,000. Each unit comprises one common share and one-half of a transferable warrant, with each whole warrant exercisable at $0.45 for 24 months, and the company plans to use the funds for general corporate purposes, including arm’s-length payables.

The offering may include finders’ fees of up to 10% in line with Canadian Securities Exchange regulations, and all securities issued will be subject to a four-month-plus-one-day hold period under applicable securities laws. Directors and officers may participate in the financing, which constitutes a related party transaction under MI 61-101 but is expected to be exempt from formal valuation and minority shareholder approval requirements, streamlining the capital raise while potentially aligning insider interests with other investors.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:GXLD is a Neutral.

Hi-View Resources Inc. faces significant financial challenges with no revenue and negative earnings. While the balance sheet is strong, persistent cash flow issues pose risks. To see Spark’s full report on TSE:GXLD stock, click here.

More about Hi-View Resources Inc

Hi-View Resources Inc. is a publicly listed mineral exploration company on the Canadian Securities Exchange focused on advancing gold, silver and copper assets in the Toodoggone region of northern British Columbia. Its 100% owned and optioned projects span more than 27,791 hectares, including the high-priority Lawyers East, Borealis and Golden Stranger projects, alongside additional Nub, Saunders, Northern Claims and Harmon Peak properties and new mineral claim applications.

data.title: Softlab Buys Synthesis3 Units to Boost IT Consulting and Enter Facility Management
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Softlab S.p.A. ( (IT:SFT) ) has issued an update.

Softlab S.p.A. has signed a definitive agreement to acquire the IT consulting and facility management business units of Synthesis3 S.r.l. for €1.49 million, adding €1.7 million in 2024 revenues with an EBITDA margin of 22.7% and bringing in a team of specialists and multi-year contracts with top-tier corporate customers. The deal strengthens Softlab’s position in advanced IT consulting while marking its strategic entry into the fast-growing facility management market through skills in IWMS platforms and a partnership with a major international player, creating room for cross-selling, broader sector coverage and more stable, diversified revenues.

By integrating these assets, Softlab aims to enhance its ability to manage high-tech, high-value projects and expand its offering across complementary sectors. The transaction, supported by independent valuations and due diligence, is presented by management as a qualitative leap in its growth strategy, reinforcing the company’s presence in core ICT consulting and opening a new growth avenue in smart, data-driven real estate and workspace management solutions.

More about Softlab S.p.A.

Softlab S.p.A., listed on Euronext Milan, operates in business advisory, ICT consulting and digital solutions, offering high value-added technology services to large corporate clients. The company focuses on software and data engineering, IT project management, business analysis and custom development for complex digital transformation programs.

data.title: SRx Health Solutions Receives NYSE Warning on Listing Compliance
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from SRx Health Solutions ( (SRXH) ).

On February 18, 2026, SRx Health Solutions received a public warning letter from NYSE Regulation stating it had violated Sections 301 and 713 of the NYSE American Company Guide. The breaches stemmed from issuing about 7.5 million common shares between December 31, 2025 and January 23, 2026 upon conversion of Series A preferred shares without proper listing approval or compliant shareholder authorization.

The exchange determined that SRx failed to obtain prior NYSE approval for the additional listed securities and that its written-consent shareholder approval was deficient under NYSE’s internal guidance on large share issuances. While all Series A preferred shares have since been converted or redeemed, the warning underscores the company’s noncompliance with continued listing requirements and signals that further violations could expose SRx to more severe regulatory actions, including potential delisting proceedings.

The most recent analyst rating on (SRXH) stock is a Hold with a $0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SRx Health Solutions stock, see the SRXH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SRXH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRXH is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (large losses, high leverage, and negative recent cash flow) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation looks optically low but is less reliable given earnings quality, while recent corporate actions modestly offset risk via capital-structure simplification amid a higher-risk strategic pivot.

To see Spark’s full report on SRXH stock, click here.

More about SRx Health Solutions

SRx Health Solutions, Inc. operates in the healthcare sector and is listed on the NYSE American exchange. The company has recently engaged in equity financing involving Series A Convertible Preferred Stock, which can be converted into common shares, affecting its capital structure and share count on the public market.

SRx’s activities around preferred share issuance and conversion indicate an active use of capital markets instruments to raise funds and manage its balance sheet. These transactions have drawn scrutiny from the exchange, highlighting the compliance-sensitive nature of its financing strategy and its obligations under NYSE American listing rules.

data.title: Earth Science Tech Appoints New Independent PCAOB Auditor
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Earth Science Tech ( (ETST) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 17, 2026, Earth Science Tech, Inc., a strategic holding company focused on a diversified, vertically integrated health and wellness portfolio that includes compounding pharmacies, telemedicine platforms, healthcare facilities, real estate, and consumer kitchen products, announced a key change in its audit oversight. The company has been expanding rapidly across pharmacy compounding, telemedicine, and real estate, increasing the complexity of its consolidated accounting and sharpening the need for more robust financial governance.

On that date, Earth Science Tech disclosed that it had engaged Semple, Marchal & Cooper, LLP as its new independent PCAOB auditor, in what it described as a strategic upgrade to its financial governance infrastructure. The board concluded that Semple’s broader resources and specialized expertise were better suited to the company’s evolving operational scale and increasingly complex financial structure, signaling a move to strengthen audit capabilities and support ETST’s continued expansion trajectory.

The most recent analyst rating on (ETST) stock is a Buy with a $0.14 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Earth Science Tech stock, see the ETST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ETST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ETST is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved fundamentals (profitability, strong margins, positive free cash flow, and low leverage) and supportive recent corporate updates (strong quarterly results and buybacks). Offsetting these positives, technical signals are bearish with the stock trading below key moving averages and weak momentum indicators, keeping the overall score in the mid-range despite a relatively modest P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on ETST stock, click here.

More about Earth Science Tech

Earth Science Tech, Inc. is a diversified holding company in the health and wellness sector, operating a vertically integrated portfolio that spans compounding pharmacies, telemedicine platforms, and targeted healthcare facilities across multiple U.S. states. The company also manages a real estate and asset management arm, a direct-to-consumer kitchen products brand leveraging proprietary IP, and supports prescription affordability through its Earth Science Foundation non-profit.

Through subsidiaries such as RxCompoundStore.com and Mister Meds, ETST provides sterile and non-sterile compounded medications, while Peaks Curative, DOConsultation.com, and Las Villas Health Care deliver personalized care, telemedicine connectivity, and clinical support. Its Avenvi unit oversees real estate and assets, and MagneChef serves as the company’s innovative consumer products brand, broadening ETST’s exposure beyond core healthcare operations.

data.title: D2 Lithium Ends $550,000 Counterclaims and Consolidates Legal Actions
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from D2 Lithium ( (TSE:DTWO) ).

D2 Lithium Corp. has secured the discontinuance of five counterclaims totaling $550,000 that were filed in 2023 by former directors, officers, and certain employees, with full and final releases granted in the company’s favor. The removal of these claims reduces potential legal liabilities and may support a stronger financial and operational footing for the lithium explorer.

The company also reported that multiple ongoing litigation claims involving former directors Chris Brown and Sameer Uplenchwar, as well as their spouses, have been consolidated into a single action in the Court of King’s Bench of Alberta. Consolidation of the suits is expected to streamline the legal process, while the company has committed to providing further updates on any material developments that could influence stakeholders’ assessment of governance and legal risk.

More about D2 Lithium

D2 Lithium Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on lithium assets, with its shares listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol DWTO and on the OTC market under DTWOF. The company is advancing core mineral properties in the lithium sector, aiming to strengthen its balance sheet and position within the battery metals supply chain.

data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

Ariston Holding NV ( (IT:ARIS) ) has issued an announcement.

Ariston Holding N.V. repurchased 9,321 ordinary shares between 16 and 20 February 2026 under its ongoing buyback programme, at an average price of €5.1952 for a total outlay of about €48,400. Following these transactions, the company holds 4,808,381 treasury shares, equivalent to 3.2577% of issued ordinary shares and 1.2905% of total share capital.

The buyback is part of a mandate granted to Mediobanca to acquire up to 1 million shares by May 2027 and is aimed at servicing current and future long-term incentive plans for employees and management. The continued execution of the programme underscores Ariston’s commitment to equity-based compensation, while slightly increasing its treasury stock position without materially altering its capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ARIS) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ariston Holding NV stock, see the IT:ARIS Stock Forecast page.

More about Ariston Holding NV

Ariston Holding N.V. operates in the heating and hot water solutions industry, providing residential and commercial products with a focus on thermal comfort technologies.
